99,Wall Follower,true,132,256,256,395,612.0000,1.16,510,132

=== Benchmark Summary (100 mazes, 16x16) ===
Time-Aware A*: success 100/100, avg speed-run steps 101.5, avg exploration cells 243.1, avg turns 373.2, avg simulated time 573.1s, avg compute 3.7ms
Flood Fill: success 100/100, avg speed-run steps 101.5, avg exploration cells 243.1, avg turns 373.2, avg simulated time 573.1s, avg compute 3.4ms
Wall Follower: success 100/100, avg speed-run steps 171.5, avg exploration cells 256.0, avg turns 425.1, avg simulated time 655.8s, avg compute 1.4ms

- Time-Aware A* reached the goal in 40.8% fewer speed-run steps than Wall Follower while exploring 5.3% fewer cells during the discovery phase.
- Time-Aware A* completed speed runs in 0.0% fewer steps than Flood Fill and finished 0.0% faster in simulated time (diagonal-aware routing with turn costs).
- Flood Fill took 40.8% fewer speed-run steps than Wall Follower and explored 5.0% fewer cells during discovery.
- Wall Follower used 14.4% more simulated time end-to-end than Flood Fill across the full explore-and-sprint cycle.

=== Aggregate Table ===
Algorithm         Speed Steps   Explored Cells  Turns     Sim Time (s)  Compute (ms)  
Time-Aware A*     101.5         243.1           373.2     573.1         3.7           
Flood Fill        101.5         243.1           373.2     573.1         3.4           
Wall Follower     171.5         256.0           425.1     655.8         1.4
